Chat Edit: 'Finish the highest-priority GUI Designer stubs from the audit (layout parsing, animation update) so the MASM UI builder can supply the modes that main_window_masm.asm expects.
Implement the missing ML loader accessors (ml_masm_get_tensor, ml_masm_get_arch) and the remaining UI helpers (ui_create_mode_combo, dialog controls) referenced by main_window_masm.asm.
Evaluate whether the Rawr1024 engine code can be ported or replaced; without rawr1024_* implementations, key model-building features can’t ship, so either implement those routines or decide on an alternative data provider.

continue fully '

Chat Edit: 'Finish the highest-priority GUI Designer stubs from the audit (layout parsing, animation update) so the MASM UI builder can supply the modes that main_window_masm.asm expects.
Implement the missing ML loader accessors (ml_masm_get_tensor, ml_masm_get_arch) and the remaining UI helpers (ui_create_mode_combo, dialog controls) referenced by main_window_masm.asm.
Evaluate whether the Rawr1024 engine code can be ported or replaced; without rawr1024_* implementations, key model-building features can’t ship, so either implement those routines or decide on an alternative data provider.
